descript.abstract: Data available online through the Arkansas Spatial Data Infrastructure (ASDI) at http://gis.arkansas.gov. Federal Communications Commission Antenna Structure Registration. This dataset was derived using the registration data uploaded and maintained at the following web address http://wireless.fcc.gov/antenna/index.htm?job=uls_transaction=weekly. Each record represents an Enitity that has filed a tower registration with the FCC through the FCC Universal Licensing System. The data was processed through SQL Server and an appropriate View was exported. The data has been buffered within GIS software to include 10 miles outside the County boundaries maintained by AHTD.
descript.purpose: Each record represents a tower that was registered through the FCC ASR managment process. The records spatially coorelate to the physical location of the tower as regristered IAW with the FCC's guidelines
descript.supplinf: This data will be generated annually

idinfo.useconst: The data herein, including but not limited to geographic data, tabular data, analytical data, electronic data structures or files, are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, either expressed or implied, or statutory, including, but not limited to, the implied warranties or merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. The entire risk as to the quality and performance of the data is assumed by the user. No guarantee of accuracy is granted, nor is any responsibility for reliance thereon assumed. In no event shall the Arkansas Geographic Information Office be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, consequential or special damages of any kind, including, but not limited to, loss of anticipated profits or benefits arising out of use of or reliance on the data. The Arkansas Geographic Information Office does not accept liability for any damages or misrepresentation caused by inaccuracies in the data or as a result of changes to the data caused by system transfers or other transformations or conversions, nor is there responsibility assumed to maintain the data in any manner or form. This data has been developed from the best available sources. Although efforts have been made to ensure that the data is accurate and reliable, errors and variable conditions originating from physical sources used to develop the data may be reflected in the data supplied. Users must be aware of these conditions and bear responsibility for the appropriate use of the information with respect to possible errors, scale, resolution, rectification, positional accuracy, development methodology, time period, environmental and climatic conditions and other circumstances specific to this data. The user is responsible for understanding the accuracy limitations of the data provided herein. The burden for determining fitness for use lies entirely with the user. The user should refer to the accompanying metadata notes for a description of the data and data development procedures. Although this data has been processed successfully on computers at the Arkansas Geographic Information Office, no guarantee, expressed or implied, is made by Arkansas Geographic Information Office regarding the use of these data on any other system, nor does the act of distribution constitute or imply any such warranty. Distribution of these data is intended for information purposes and should not be considered authoritative for engineering, legal and other site-specific uses.
idinfo.datacred: Federal Communications Comission Antenna Structure Registration
idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.3.0.4322

attr.attrdef: Entity specific numbered assigned by ULM proccess
Indicates the City where the Entity resides
Indicates the name of Entity that filed the regristration
Indicates the State the structure resides
Indicates the County the Structure resides
Indicates the physical street address for the structure
Indicates the lighting and marking guidelines the structure conforms with
First name or primary of Entity POC for ASR registrations
Represents a coordinate conversion from Degrees Minutes, Seconds to Decimal Degrees for Longitude or X
Represents a coordinate conversion from Degrees Minutes, Seconds to Decimal Degrees for Latitude or Y
Indicates the Zip Code the Structure is associated with
Represents Lighting where different from predetermined values
Indicates the City the Structure resides

edom.edomvd: When used as a support for an antenna

edom.edomvds: *Valid Tower Arrays. Code definition: The first NN indicates the number of towers in an AM tower array. The second NN indicates the position of the tower in the array. (ex: 3GTA2 would identify the second tower in a three guyed tower array; 14LTA12 would identify the 12th tower in a 14 lattice tower array).

edom.edomvd: Any type of Sign or Billboard

edom.edomvds: *Valid Tower Arrays. Code definition: The first NN indicates the number of towers in an AM tower array. The second NN indicates the position of the tower in the array. (ex: 3GTA2 would identify the second tower in a three guyed tower array; 14LTA12 would identify the 12th tower in a 14 lattice tower array).
No longer used. These structure types were previously used to describe “multiple towers” at one location. The number indicated the number of towers at this same location.
was replaced with more the more descriptive tower types: GTOWER, LTOWER, MTOWER. TOWER was previously described as: a self-support or guyed structure used for communication purposes.

edom.edomvd: Any type of Tank (water, gas, etc.)

edom.edomvds: Was replaced with the more descriptive tower array types: NNGTANN, NNLTANN, NNMTANN. Previously used to indicate the tower was part of an AM tower array. The first number indicated the number of towers in the array. The second number indicated the position of the tower in the array.

edom.edomvd: Utility Pole/Tower used to provide service (electric, telephone, etc.)
Oil or other type of Rig

edom.edomvds: *Valid Tower Arrays. Code definition: The first NN indicates the number of towers in an AM tower array. The second NN indicates the position of the tower in the array. (ex: 3GTA2 would identify the second tower in a three guyed tower array; 14LTA12 would identify the 12th tower in a 14 lattice tower array).

edom.edomvd: Guyed Structure used for communication purposes

attr.attrdef: Codes corelate to either FAA Circular number or FCC Form 715/715A. See Specification code for applicable publication
Elevation of terrain at base of structure
Value coorelates to Chapter of FAA Circular number represent type of Lighting system indicated
Represents the concatenated values LAT_DEGREES, LAT_MINS, & LAT_SECS
A value of 1,2, or 3 = FAA Circular for Paint and Light, 4 = FCC 715/715A
Represents the concatenated values of LONG_DEGREES, LONG_MINS, & LONG_SECS
Represents the primary mailing address for the responsible Entity
Represents the State in which the Entity resides

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Last name of primary Entity POC
Suffix name for primary Entity POC

distinfo.distliab: The data herein, including but not limited to geographic data, tabular data, analytical data, electronic data structures or files, are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, either expressed or implied, or statutory, including, but not limited to, the implied warranties or merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. The entire risk as to the quality and performance of the data is assumed by the user. No guarantee of accuracy is granted, nor is any responsibility for reliance thereon assumed. In no event shall the Arkansas Geographic Information Office be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, consequential or special damages of any kind, including, but not limited to, loss of anticipated profits or benefits arising out of use of or reliance on the data. The Arkansas Geographic Information Office does not accept liability for any damages or misrepresentation caused by inaccuracies in the data or as a result of changes to the data caused by system transfers or other transformations or conversions, nor is there responsibility assumed to maintain the data in any manner or form. This data has been developed from the best available sources. Although efforts have been made to ensure that the data is accurate and reliable, errors and variable conditions originating from physical sources used to develop the data may be reflected in the data supplied. Users must be aware of these conditions and bear responsibility for the appropriate use of the information with respect to possible errors, scale, resolution, rectification, positional accuracy, development methodology, time period, environmental and climatic conditions and other circumstances specific to this data. The user is responsible for understanding the accuracy limitations of the data provided herein. The burden for determining fitness for use lies entirely with the user. The user should refer to the accompanying metadata notes for a description of the data and data development procedures. Although this data has been processed successfully on computers at the Arkansas Geographic Information Office, no guarantee, expressed or implied, is made by Arkansas Geographic Information Office regarding the use of these data on any other system, nor does the act of distribution constitute or imply any such warranty. Distribution of these data is intended for information purposes and should not be considered authoritative for engineering, legal and other site-specific uses.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
